title: QR Code Statistics Every Marketer Should Know in 2026

title: The 5-Minute Rule: Why Speed-to-Lead Decides Who Wins the Deal
description: Lead conversion drops up to 8x after the first five minutes. Here's the research behind speed-to-lead, why most teams still respond in hours, and how to automate a sub-minute response with QR flows.
